title: Cleaning checklist template
summary: Generate a practical household cleaning checklist from home size, cleaning frequency, and minutes per session. Includes copy/save/export flow and a paid upgrade path.
selection_rule: Deliver the lowest-friction household checklist first, then export path, save intent, and optional paid bundle.
task_phrase: A person searching cleaning checklist template needs a useful answer without signup or fragile spreadsheet rebuild.

module_manifest.title: Cleaning Checklist Template
module_manifest.install_or_save_path: Generate checklist, then use Copy/Save/Download CSV on the page without signup.
trust_evidence: source references in public template marketplaces

entries.title: Cleaning Checklist Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, choose home profile and frequency, click Generate checklist, then copy or download the result.
entries.smoke_test: Generate with defaults, then confirm checklist text appears and CSV download works.
entries.proof_signal: No login workflow with copy/save/export telemetry and paid-path visibility.
entries.fallback: Use the task resolver path in /resolver/ to compare external alternatives.
